code:
# Write your MySQL query statement below
SELECT
    ROUND(
        AVG(a.event_date IS NOT NULL),
        2
    ) AS fraction
FROM (
    SELECT
        player_id,
        MIN(event_date) AS first_login
    FROM Activity
    GROUP BY player_id
) f
LEFT JOIN Activity a
ON f.player_id = a.player_id
AND a.event_date = DATE_ADD(f.first_login, INTERVAL 1 DAY);
